## Old-compatible first-target velocity profiles

First validation target only, repeated 64 times per replicate; curves show raw x-axis effector velocity in m/s.

All rows use validation-selected per-replicate checkpoints and 64 stochastic rollout repeats per target condition, matching the old pilot-figure checkpoint and repeat convention while keeping the requested target set for this panel.
